title: Knowledge Graph Visualization - interactive concept network

title: Share to Clarity Engine - Mobile (Capacitor)

Push notification via FCM when dashboard ready. Also add iOS Shortcut as power-user fallback. Council consensus: PWA alone insufficient (iOS doesn't support Web Share Target in share sheet).

title: Convert all Gem documentation to Markdown

close_reason: All .txt files converted to .md with internal references updated. Build scripts removed.

title: Protocol Extractor Agent - extract/synthesize step-by-step protocols from video content
description: New processing agent (#8) that extracts explicit protocols, structures implicit workflows, and AI-synthesizes protocols when appropriate. Three modes: extracted (green), implicit (yellow), ai_synthesized (red). Runs after Synthesizer, parallel with Link/Gap. Pydantic model with EvidenceSpan, ProtocolStep (branching), ProtocolQuality scoring. Medical safety: never invent dosages, confidence gating, human review flags. Dashboard: collapsible protocol cards with color-coded modes, timestamp-linked steps, flowchart view toggle, export PDF. Aggregated: side-by-side comparison, consensus highlighting, conflict detection. NEVER auto-merge medical protocols.
close_reason: Completed: Protocol Extractor implemented (duplicate of ai_projects-75a)

description: Need county-level MA penetration rates to adjust FFS revenue estimates. Currently using default 35% rate. Check CMS monthly enrollment data or KFF Medicare Advantage data.

Types: flowchart, comparison, hierarchy, timeline, concept map. Mermaid primary, AI image generation for visual/artistic needs. Quality validation, node limits, fallback to text.

title: Intelligent Infographic Generator - Mermaid + AI images
description: New processing agent (#9) that generates visual infographics when concepts benefit from visualization. LLM-based classifier decides: Route A (Mermaid), Route B (AI Image), Route C (HTML/CSS table), Route D (no visual needed). Max 3 infographics per video. Quality: max 10-12 nodes, syntax validation, fallback to text. Custom CSS theme. SVG export. Text accessibility descriptions for all visuals. Runs after Synthesizer + Protocol Extractor.
